name: Household membership actions
description: Implement membership lifecycle actions. Backend: DELETE /api/v1/households/:id/invitations/:invitationId (admin-only; revoke pending invite), DELETE /api/v1/households/:id/members/me (leave household; blocks if caller is the last admin), DELETE /api/v1/households/:id/members/:userId (admin-only; remove member with audit entry), PATCH /api/v1/households/:id/members/:userId (admin-only; promote/demote role; blocks demoting last admin). Frontend: Members page listing members with role badges and action menus (Remove, Promote/Demote), and a Leave Household button in household settings. Per docs/product-specs/household-invitation.md and role-permission.md.
